extraction.one_line_summary: COQUARD Bryan won bunch sprint after Jayco-AlUla's crosswind split attempt failed, caught before decisive finale despite 20-second gap
tactical_patterns: Jayco-AlUla premeditated crosswind attack near Aldinga failed when chase group bridged within final 20km despite initial 20s gap.
Ineos Grenadiers paced chase aggressively to protect Yates' GC position rather than let domestiques dangle in second group.
Intermediate sprint points tactical: Honoré contested 1-pointer to stay in jersey hunt, showing unusual commitment for domestique role.

rider_signals.COQUARD Bryan: positive: first WorldTour win after 10-year career reveals late-bloomer potential in reduced bunch sprints
rider_signals.VINE Jay: positive: held 15-second GC advantage through crosswind chaos while mixing it in sprint, showing versatility
rider_signals.YATES Adam: negative: required team to burn matches chasing crosswind split rather than being alert in front group
rider_signals.IMPEY Daryl: neutral: initiated breakaway attempt but willingly sat up when caught, suggesting reconnaissance rather than genuine escape effort
